item.title: Fans' guide to men's basketball this March: The 10 most important things to know
item.description: The five teams at the top. The players to watch. The narratives likely to shape the conference and NCAA tournaments.

item.title: Men's Bracketology: Champ Week chaos is alive and well
item.description: True to form, the early conference tournaments have provided upsets and some unexpected champions.

item.title: What if KD's sneaker was smaller? An alternate timeline with new champs and wild trades
item.description: ESPN analyst Zach Kram examines a reality in which Durant's foot didn't touch the 3-point line in the 2021 Eastern Conference semifinals -- and its ri...

item.title: How the schedule could impact three key NBA playoff races
item.description: With so many teams tanking, some playoff-bound teams could capitalize on easy schedules down the stretch.

item.title: Fantasy baseball: Eric Karabell's 'Do not draft' list
item.description: Eric Karabell identifies the players unlikely to be on his roster this season due to too much risk, too much hype or not enough at-bats.
